name: European Contemporary
description: Refined European apartment style — considered material mix (stone, brass, dark woods, plaster), architectural elegance, balanced decorative density, soft natural light.

name: Modern Wabi-Sabi
description: Japanese wabi-sabi reinterpreted for modern interiors — limewashed and plaster walls, undyed linen, hand-thrown ceramics, aged and raw woods, muted earth tones, embraced imperfection and asymmetry.

name: Warm Minimalism
description: Minimal but never cold — soft neutrals, layered natural textiles, warm woods, abundant diffuse natural light, restrained but inviting and lived-in.
